hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.description: Full-stack developer with experience in enterprise search engines and AI-powered chatbot platforms. Contributed to GS 1st-grade certified products across public and private sectors.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: Full-stack developer with 2+ years of experience building backend systems, enterprise search engines, and multi-agent AI chatbots. Care about performance, clean architecture, and shipping products that work in production.
about.details: Currently at Warebiz building ArgosSearch (Elasticsearch-based enterprise search) and Argos AI Chat Search (multi-agent RAG chatbot). Both achieved GS 1st-grade certification.
about.educationText: Korea National Open University — Computer Science (2025.03–, Expected graduation Spring 2027)
about.experienceText: Warebiz · Full-Stack Dev · 2025.09– / KennyCompany · Backend Dev · 2023.12–2025.04

projects.title: Projects
projects.description1:
· Java 17 / Spring Boot 3 enterprise search engine on Elasticsearch
· Autocomplete, related search, spell-correction, synonym/stopword processing
· Dynamic external DB indexing (Oracle, PostgreSQL, MariaDB at runtime)
· Quartz scheduler, Apache Tika parsing pipeline (PDF, Word, Excel)
· JWT + Spring Security auth
projects.description2:
· Co-built multi-agent RAG chatbot platform (founding engineer, team of 2)
· Supervisor architecture, Qdrant Dense search + CrossEncoder re-ranking pipeline
· Scenario agent with instant response at similarity ≥ 0.9
· FastAPI + SQLAlchemy multi-tenant admin API
· Next.js dashboard & chatbot widget (Zustand), NVIDIA GPU server Docker deployment
projects.description3:
· Data crawling from 700+ sites, 3,000+ records/day
· Node.js cron scheduler + FCM-integrated push notification system
· Spring-based admin dashboard with Node.js backend optimization
projects.resultText1: Deployed and maintained for KOSHA, CJ OnlyOne Foodnet, Goryeong County, and NEOWISE.
projects.resultText2: GS 1st-grade certification achieved. Patent registered. Deployed to Geomdan DopNetwork.
projects.resultText3: 3,000+ records/day from 700+ sites. FCM-based real-time alert delivery to end users.
projects.description4:
· Maintenance and feature improvements for public transit system
· SXSSFWorkbook-based bulk Excel download (new feature)
· Banner UI & image management development
· API response optimization, JSP legacy code maintenance
projects.description5:
· Spring Boot backend (member, cart, order flow)
· Kakao/Naver OAuth login and payment API integration
· AWS EC2 deployment
projects.description6:
· eGov framework-based system maintenance and feature improvements
· SXSSFWorkbook-based bulk Excel download (new feature)
· Feature changes and exception handling per agency requests
· UI usability improvements and QC feedback response
projects.resultText4: Public-facing system live at gbms.gg.go.kr, serving Gyeonggi Province transit operations.
projects.resultText5: End-to-end shopping mall with OAuth login and payment integration. Available on GitHub.
projects.resultText6: Deployed to Gyeonggi Provincial public bus administration agencies (Yongin, Pajoo, Hanam, etc.).

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for collaboration, questions, or just to say hello.

hero.title: 풀스택 개발자
hero.description: 엔터프라이즈 검색 엔진과 AI 챗봇 플랫폼을 개발한 풀스택 개발자. 공공·민간 분야에 GS 1등급 인증 제품을 납품했습니다.

about.title: 소개
about.intro: 백엔드 시스템, 엔터프라이즈 검색 엔진, 멀티에이전트 AI 챗봇을 개발한 2년차 풀스택 개발자. 성능, 클린 아키텍처, 실제로 동작하는 제품 출시를 중요하게 생각합니다.
about.details: 현재 웨어비즈에서 ArgosSearch(Elasticsearch 기반 검색 엔진)와 Argos AI Chat Search(멀티에이전트 RAG 챗봇)를 개발하고 있으며, 두 제품 모두 GS 1등급 인증을 취득했습니다.
about.experienceText: 웨어비즈 · 풀스택 개발자 · 2025.09~ / 케니컴퍼니 · 백엔드 개발자 · 2023.12~2025.04

projects.title: 프로젝트

· Oracle·PostgreSQL·MariaDB 런타임 동적 외부 DB 연동

contact.title: 연락처
